metadata.description: Personal agent toolkit — individually installable skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: astro
plugins.description: Build with the Astro web framework (v6+) — islands, content collections, actions, SSR, view transitions.

plugins.name: browser-bugs
plugins.description: Audit frontend code for 50 cross-browser bugs and mobile compatibility pitfalls.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Git commit workflow with conventional commits, branch/push/PR support.

plugins.name: generate-favicon
plugins.description: Generate a minimal favicon set from SVG — ICO, SVG with dark mode, Apple Touch Icon, PWA icons, manifest.

plugins.name: grill-me
plugins.description: Stress-test any plan, design, or idea through relentless interviewing — domain-agnostic.

plugins.name: humanizer
plugins.description: Remove signs of AI-generated writing from voiced prose: blog posts, essays, announcements.

plugins.name: import-skill
plugins.description: Import skills from GitHub repos (copy or merge).

plugins.name: improve-architecture
plugins.description: Find architectural improvements with assessment gate, cohesion checks, and test writing.

plugins.name: refactor
plugins.description: Refactor code at any scope (project/file/method) with idempotent assessment gate.

plugins.name: repo-prose
plugins.description: Write clear technical prose for commits, PRs, reviews, issues, docs, and error messages.

plugins.name: taskwarrior
plugins.description: Taskwarrior CLI reference for managing tasks, bugs, and work items.
